name: DatoCMS
description: DatoCMS is a headless CMS with a GraphQL Content Delivery API and a REST Content Management API. Use the CMA REST API to create, read, update, and delete content records, manage content models, and upload media assets. GraphQL is also available at graphql.datocms.com for read-optimized queries.

capabilities.name: list_items
capabilities.description: List all records (items) belonging to a specific content model. Supports pagination, filtering, and ordering.

capabilities.name: get_item
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content record by its ID, including all field values and metadata.

capabilities.name: create_item
capabilities.description: Create a new content record for a given model type with specified field values.

capabilities.name: update_item
capabilities.description: Update an existing content record by its ID, modifying one or more field values.

capabilities.name: delete_item
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a content record by its ID.

capabilities.name: list_models
capabilities.description: List all content models (item types) defined in the DatoCMS project, including their fields and validation rules.

capabilities.name: upload_asset
capabilities.description: Upload a file or image asset to DatoCMS media library. Supports images, documents, and videos with optional metadata.
